title: Governed Transition, Conflict, and Approval Engine
description: Govern all knowledge-state transitions transactionally while binding transition authority to exact before-and-after hashes, execution context, and non-escalating approval grants.
acceptance_criteria: Correction, refinement, expansion, restriction, supersession, reversal, retraction, context shift, confidence change, merge, split, and deprecation are enforced
Every transition binds exact before-and-after hashes, execution context, approval identity, and transaction receipt
TEST transition approvals cannot mutate PRODUCTION state or produce production receipts
Invalid, cyclic, contradictory, context-mismatched, or unauthorized transitions fail closed
Branch, merge, overlap, and conflicting-authority states are explicit and reconstructable
Human-state transition regression tests pass through the generic engine without weakening human-specific controls
